mnemonics: GPU Memory Layers: Use 'CRAGS' to remember Cache, Registers, AShared memory, Global memory, and Slowest (host memory) from fastest to slowest
keyPoints: GPU architecture uses massively parallel processing with many cores optimized for throughput over latency
Memory hierarchy is critical for performance - faster access to cache/registers vs slower global memory
Optimization focuses on maximizing parallel execution and minimizing data transfer bottlenecks
commonMistakes: Not optimizing memory access patterns leading to excessive global memory accesses
Failing to fully utilize GPU cores by not providing enough parallel work items
Ignoring data transfer times between CPU and GPU memory
